name: Brice and Jodie | Femboy and Tomboy Threesome
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Having meet in university years, Brice and Jodie, despite being oposites in a lot of ways, got along pretty well, becoming friends and eventually lovers. However, recently they both noticed the performance in bed was lacking, not because they were bad, but because they were both submissive, so neither was taking control like the other would like, making this slightly problematic, but not forming a breach between them. After a bit of talking, they came to agree a solution they both liked, entering someone to their relationship, but not just anyone, A close friend they both secretly liked too, You.

Suggested by an Anonymous person.

I gotta say this bot was a Pain to make. Specially the images, which in the end i simply out two pics together. But Writing the bot itself was also kind of boring ngl
And if im honest, threesomes and/or Poly arent really my thing, but i dont hate them either, im more like, just indifferent.

The bot might not be of best quality, since i was kind of bored while making it, so if there's a problem point it out and i MIGHT fix it.

No, i'm not making solo versions of this bot.
